details.test: Task 1: Earliest telehealth anxiety consult for adult
Task 2: Estimate couples counseling cost and send inquiry within budget
Task 3: Join waitlist for affordable trauma group starting next month
Task 4: Save Spanish speaking teen therapist with sliding scale
Task 5: Submit new client intake for adult self pay with work stress
Task 6: Sign up for newsletter with anxiety and work stress topics
Task 7: Build toolkit with at least two panic attack resources
Task 8: Check cancellation policy and send cancellation message
Task 9: Request quote for virtual workplace mental health workshop
